retrieval.query_summary: EURUSD structural alignment and setup validation

factors.name: Macro bias alignment
factors.notes: Strong US economic data supports bullish DXY and bearish EURUSD.

factors.name: Valid Structural Entry Support
factors.notes: No valid unmitigated entry zone with proper risk parameters.

factors.name: Minimum R:R achievable
factors.notes: SL offset rules reduce R:R below the minimum 1:3 requirement.

cot_signal.summary: No speculative positioning data available for this cycle.

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The market is currently exhibiting LTF noise and counter-trend retracements. Bullish setups (such as CHOCH_BMS_RTO_BULLISH on M15) are rejected as they oppose the dominant HTF bearish trend without a confirmed 1D bullish CHoCH, violating STYLE-SETUP-004 and MR-REJECT-006. Bearish setups are also rejected: QML_KILLER_TYPE2_BEARISH_1.1645 lacks Marubozu validation on the breakout candle, violating Universal Rule 1. SH_BMS_RTO_BEARISH_BEARISH_1.1649_95563ff8 has an extremely tight SL of 0.7 pips, violating STYLE-RISK-003 (minimum 3-5 pip offset from the OB upper bound of 1.16496). Adjusting the SL to a safe structural level (e.g., 1.1653) reduces the R:R to 1.65R, which is below the minimum 1:3 required for Intraday style (violating STYLE-RR-001 and MR-REJECT-010). We remain patient and wait for price to mitigate the unmitigated D1 bearish FVG at 1.16634 - 1.16952 or the H3 supply zone at 1.17222 - 1.17782 before seeking a high-confluence entry.

htf_bias.notes: HTF structure is strongly bearish across D1, H12, H8, H6, H4, H3, and H1.

mtf_bias.notes: M30 structure is bearish, while M15 is temporarily bullish as a counter-trend retracement.
